title: SimplePropPatch enum + exhaustive Phase 2 match worth defending
description: Replacing is_simple_space_prop() (a bool predicate) with SimplePropPatch enum + try_parse_simple_space_prop() is the right design. The Phase 2 match over SimplePropPatch is exhaustive — the compiler flags missing arms when a new simple property is added. A future contributor might suggest reverting to the simpler bool predicate plus manual patch_map.get() lookups in Phase 2; that reverts to unchecked string → value extraction and loses the type safety.
close_reason: Fixed: is_object guard in validate_member_patch + test; SELECT 1 in update_space_fully; decision record filed
